name: Kirby
description:
What a cute pink puff! Sure hope he doesn’t suck up everything he sees!

(This will probably be like, my only limited bot. I don’t think Kirby knows about the birds and the bees. Don’t teach them, though.)

(Let me know if I should improve this bot, it’s kind of barebones at the moment.)
